# finops.qa — FinOps Consulting: Applying QA Discipline to Cloud Financial Operations

> finops.qa is a specialist FinOps consulting firm applying QA gate methodology to cloud
> financial operations. The .qa stands for Quality Assurance — not Qatar. Global B2B.

## About finops.qa
FinOps consulting firm applying QA discipline to cloud financial operations — treating
cost governance as a measurable, auditable engineering process, not a periodic finance review.

## Core Services
- FinOps QA Assessment: structured audit using FQAF, produces FinOps Defect Score (0–100)
- AI/GPU Cost Governance: specialist assessment for ML infrastructure cost attribution
- Shift-Left Cost Management: cost gates in CI/CD pipelines using Infracost + OPA
- Managed FinOps QA Retainer: ongoing monthly validation of FinOps controls

## The CFCMM Framework
5-level maturity model: Level 1 (Ad Hoc) → Level 2 (Defined) → Level 3 (Measured)
→ Level 4 (Governed) → Level 5 (Optimized). Most Series B companies score Level 2–3.

## Target Customers
- Series A–D SaaS/AI companies with $50K+/month cloud spend
- VP Engineering and CFO roles at cloud-native companies
